    Method
    Description
    List<TimeData>
    ReservationDAO.getTimeDataBetween(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
    Extracts time-related data (arrival, departure) for reports within a date range.

  • Uses of TimeData in logicControllers

    Methods in logicControllers that return types with arguments of type TimeData
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<TimeData>
    TimeReportController.generateReportData(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)
    Fetches raw time-related data for reservations within a specific date range. * @param start The start date of the report period.
    Method parameters in logicControllers with type arguments of type TimeData
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<String,Integer>
    TimeReportController.calculateDelays(List<TimeData> list)
    Calculates delays in table turnover by comparing the expected departure time (defined as Reservation Time + 2 hours) with the actual departure time.
    Map<String,Integer>
    TimeReportController.calculateLateArrivals(List<TimeData> list)
    Categorizes and counts late arrivals into specific time buckets.
